creator: hk@alogis.com
text:
units.lib does not contain actual exchange rates.

Examples:
  rate of euro against dollar is from 2002-07-09
  rate of euro is given as         0.99 $
  as of 07.09.2006, this should be 1.28092 $

  rate of polandzloty is with .000059 $
  as of 07.09.2006, this should be .32307 $

Is this not updated/maintained on a regular basis?
